label: Phyphox 2D Motion Dashboard
info: Live 2D trajectory dashboard using Phyphox accelerometer data.

name: Set Phyphox URL
2D Physics Engine
Motion Values
format:
Acceleration
ax: {{msg.payload.ax | number:3}} m/s²
ay: {{msg.payload.ay | number:3}} m/s²
Velocity
vx: {{msg.payload.vx | number:3}} m/s
vy: {{msg.payload.vy | number:3}} m/s
Position
x: {{msg.payload.x | number:3}} m
y: {{msg.payload.y | number:3}} m

name: 2D Canvas Trajectory
format:
<canvas id="trajCanvas" width="900" height="430" style="width:100%; height:430px; border:1px solid #999; background:#fafafa;"></canvas>
<script>
(function(scope) {
    scope.$watch('msg', function(msg) {
        if (!msg || !msg.payload || !msg.payload.trajectory) return;
        const canvas = document.getElementById('trajCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const W = canvas.width;
        const H = canvas.height;
        const pts = msg.payload.trajectory;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ddd';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(W/2, 0); ctx.lineTo(W/2, H);
        ctx.moveTo(0, H/2); ctx.lineTo(W, H/2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
        ctx.font = '14px Arial';
        ctx.fillText('2-D Trajectory: x-y position', 10, 20);
        ctx.fillText('x=' + msg.payload.x.toFixed(2) + ' m, y=' + msg.payload.y.toFixed(2) + ' m', 10, 40);
        ctx.fillText('state=' + msg.payload.state, 10, 60);
        const scale = 120; // pixels per meter
        function px(p) { return W/2 + p.x * scale; }
        function py(p) { return H/2 - p.y * scale; }
        if (pts.length > 1) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565c0';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(px(pts[0]), py(pts[0]));
            for (let i = 1; i < pts.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(px(pts[i]), py(pts[i]));
            ctx.stroke();
        }
        const last = pts[pts.length - 1];
        if (last) {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#d32f2f';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px(last), py(last), 7, 0, 2*Math.PI);
            ctx.fill();
        }
    });
})(scope);
</script>

name: Reset Physics State
